questions.q: What new content is coming to Dome Keeper on April 13, 2026, including a free multiplayer update and a paid DLC called 'The Lost Keepers'?
options: The Infiltrator and The Beastmaster keepers, new assignments, and pets.
A new story mode and increased enemy difficulty.
A different set of playable characters with unique abilities.
An expanded mining system and new base defenses.
questions.correctText: The DLC introduces two new keepers, The Infiltrator and The Beastmaster, along with new assignments and pets, while the free update adds multiplayer modes.

questions.q: Rockstar Games has confirmed a data breach occurred. What is the deadline the hacker group 'ShinyHunters' has given for a ransom payment?
questions.correctText: The hacker group ShinyHunters has set a deadline of April 14, 2026, for Rockstar Games to meet their ransom demands.

questions.q: Hazelight Studios, known for games like 'It Takes Two' and 'A Way Out,' has announced a significant sales milestone. How many total sales have their games accrued?
questions.correctText: Hazelight Studios has announced that their three games, 'A Way Out,' 'It Takes Two,' and 'Split Fiction,' have sold over 50 million copies combined.

questions.q: An opinion piece discusses the perception of game developers. What is a common accusation made against developers that the article argues is unfounded?
options: That they prioritize profit over quality
That they engage in crunch time
That they don't listen to player feedback
questions.correctText: The article argues that the accusation of developers being 'lazy' is unfounded, especially given the long hours and demanding nature of the industry.

questions.q: Xbox has announced an 'Xbox First Look' showcase. What game will be featured in this upcoming showcase?
questions.correctText: The upcoming 'Xbox First Look' showcase will feature the game 'Metro 2039'.

questions.q: Allegations have surfaced regarding the misuse of Kickstarter funds for the failed MMO 'Ashes of Creation.' What are some of the alleged personal expenses funded by the Kickstarter money?
options: Private chefs, trading cards, and luxury cigars
Artist salaries and voice actor fees
Game engine licenses and software development tools
questions.correctText: Allegations suggest that funds from the 'Ashes of Creation' Kickstarter were used for personal expenses, including private chefs, trading cards, and luxury cigars.
